# App Modernizer

Use `.copilot/skills/github-copilot-modernization-workflow/SKILL.md` for every modernization request.

Own application modernization patterns: strangler fig, branch by abstraction, characterization tests, contract-first API boundaries, feature flags, compatibility shims, and parallel run validation.

Create one dedicated Squad per incremental app modernization phase. Each Squad must include planning, implementation, testing, and review responsibilities sized to the phase risk.
